journal_date.text: ประจำวันที่

root.sql:
SELECT sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name
,sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date,'SD MONTH YYYY') as journal_tdate FROM sc_cnt_m_coop , sc_fin_m_close_day WHERE sc_fin_m_close_day.close_status = '1' and sc_fin_m_close_day.branch_fin = '01' and sc_fin_m_close_day.journal_date in ( select journal_date from sc_acc_journal_heading_firm where cancel_status = '0' ) /*WHERE*/

r_ktm_sheet_tran_nest_dr.sql:
SELECT sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sum( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.dr_amount) as dr_amount
FROM sc_acc_journal_detail_firm, sc_acc_m_account_constant, sc_acc_journal_heading_firm , sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_type = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_no = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.journal_date = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.branch_id = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.branch_id ) and ( ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.journal_date = {0}) AND ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.dr_amount > 0 ) AND ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id <> sc_acc_m_account_constant.cash_account_code ) AND ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_type = 'JV' ) AND ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.cancel_status = '0' ) ) and ( sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id) GROUP BY sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name order by sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id

r_ktm_sheet_tran_nest_cr.sql: SELECT sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sum( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.cr_amount) as cr_amount FROM sc_acc_journal_detail_firm, sc_acc_m_account_constant, sc_acc_journal_heading_firm , sc_acc_m_account_master WHERE ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_type = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_no = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.journal_date = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.branch_id = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.branch_id ) and ( ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.journal_date = {0} ) AND ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.cr_amount > 0 ) AND ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id <> sc_acc_m_account_constant.cash_account_code ) AND ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_type = 'JV' ) AND ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.cancel_status = '0' ) ) and ( sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id = sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id) GROUP BY sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name order by sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id

r_ktm_sheet_tran_nest_footer.sql: SELECT sum( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.cr_amount) as cr_amount, sum( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.dr_amount) as dr_amount FROM sc_acc_journal_detail_firm, sc_acc_m_account_constant, sc_acc_journal_heading_firm WHERE ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_type = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_no = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.journal_date = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date ) and ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.branch_id = sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.branch_id ) and ( ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.journal_date = {0}) AND ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.account_id <> sc_acc_m_account_constant.cash_account_code ) AND ( sc_acc_journal_detail_firm.doc_type = 'JV' ) AND ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.cancel_status = '0' ) )
